message:
test: add CLI logging tests, E2E snapshot spec, and fix runner assertion

Add comprehensive test coverage for CLI logging utilities and snapshot E2E:

apps/gateway/src/utils/__tests__/cli-logging.test.ts (new, 21KB):
- Test suite for CLI output logging and formatting utilities
- Covers log level filtering, structured output formatting, color handling
- Tests timestamp injection, correlation ID propagation
- Validates JSON output mode for machine-readable logs
- Edge cases: empty output, binary data handling, truncation

tests/e2e/snapshot.spec.ts (new, 6.8KB):
- End-to-end tests for system snapshot generation endpoint
- Validates snapshot structure contains all expected sections:
  NTM data, beads status, tool health, system metrics
- Tests partial snapshot handling when tools are unavailable
- Verifies snapshot caching and freshness headers
- Performance assertions for snapshot generation latency

packages/flywheel-clients/src/__tests__/cli-runner.test.ts:
- Fix assertion: stderrTruncated should be false (not undefined) when
  stderr is not truncated - aligns with explicit boolean semantics

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
